meta.authority: This table is the configuration of record (WORKFLOW §S1.1); the formula is documentation. Sources: WORKFLOW.md §S1.1, last_creation.md §§3-5 (SATRA/Fibre2Fashion, Shoemakers Academy, Barker, Best & Less Footwear Standard 2014).

length.formula_doc: last stick length_mm = (uk_size + 25) * 8.46  (size 0 = 4in; 1 size = 1 barleycorn = 1/3 in = 8.46 mm; half size = 4.23 mm)

girth_grades.heel_girth_grade_note: historic English grading ~1/2 size per size (Leno, via last_creation.md §4) — estimate

ball_girth_step_mm.rationale: quarter-inch rule (WORKFLOW §S1.1); Barker uses 6.0 — configurable. FX is a half step (+3 mm above F).

tread_width_step_mm.rationale: WORKFLOW §S1.1: tread width ≈ +2 mm per fitting step

reference_foot.comment: Foot (not last) dimensions per size at F fitting. Anchor from WORKFLOW §S1.3; other sizes graded from the anchor with the grades above. Allowances in data/allowances/fit.json convert foot -> last.

secondary_estimates.comment: ESTIMATES pending calibration (last_creation.md caveat: no free authoritative per-size table for secondary girths). Every downstream report must carry this flag.

instep_girth_offset_from_ball_mm.rationale: typical men's foot proportion: instep girth slightly exceeds ball girth

waist_girth_offset_from_ball_mm.rationale: foot waist (arch) girth typically slightly under ball girth

short_heel_girth_ratio_of_ball.rationale: short-heel girth ≈ 1.33 x ball girth (traditional proportion) — estimate

heel_width_mm_at_uk9.rationale: typical men's heel width at 1/6 foot length station; grades ~1 mm/size — estimate

tread_width_mm_at_uk9_f.rationale: typical UK 9 F ball/tread width — estimate; grades +2.1 mm/size, +2 mm/fitting

cross_check_best_and_less_2014.comment: last_creation.md §5: insole-corrected effective length (shoe cavity, i.e. foot + toe room) and FOOT ball girth ranges. Interpretation: cavity length ≈ last stick length; our formula stick lengths sit inside/near these ranges (UK9: 287.6 vs 277-288). Foot ball girths (F): our graded values sit inside the ranges (UK9: 247.4 vs 244-249). Girth tolerance in that standard: ±3 mm.

stations.comment: Measurement station positions as fractions of stick length from heel; plane tilts defined in tools/last_measure.py.

ball_fraction.rationale: WORKFLOW §S1.3: ball line at ~72-74% of stick length from heel

instep_fraction.rationale: instep station over the cone rise — convention documented in last_measure.py

waist_fraction.rationale: waist station between instep and ball

heel_width_fraction.rationale: seat width station at ~1/6 of length from heel (last_creation.md §6)
